text:
It was such a pleasure to have this little #SEO chat with @g33konaut and ask a lot of the questions about content that my clients have asked me over the years.

Thanks for having me, Martin and @googlewmc!

Hope you enjoy the video

My jaw actually dropped. 


@wilreynolds
 showed 3 examples of black doctors/nurses where Google’s Vision AI rated the image as 70%+ “Street Fashion” despite them literally wearing scrubs 

When he painted the nurses white, it switched to “Formal wear” 

Truly unbelievable

#mozcon

“Billions of people are using AI Overviews every day”

Uh yeah my dude, you made it virtually impossible to turn off
